title: Hi, I’m Saurabh Parate 👋
text:
LOL
Digital Marketing & SEO Specialist with 5+ years of experience in website content management, search optimization, and performance marketing analytics.
I currently work as a Student Digital Marketing Assistant at Cal Poly Pomona, where I manage website content, improve SEO performance, and support data-driven marketing campaigns.

title: About
text:
About Me
I am a digital marketing professional with a background in SEO, paid media, analytics, and website content management.
I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Digital Marketing and Analytics at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona.
My experience includes: - Website management in CMS platforms - SEO strategy and technical optimization - Paid media campaign support - Performance tracking using GA4, Looker Studio, and Google Tag Manager - Cross-functional collaboration on digital campaigns
My goal is to build digital experiences that improve visibility, user engagement, and measurable business outcomes.

title: Hi, I’m Saurabh Parate 👋
text:
What I Do

SEO & Website Optimization
Google Analytics (GA4), Tag Manager & Looker Studio
Paid Media (Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads)
CMS-Based Website Management (Cascade CMS)
Performance Marketing & Data Analysis

title: Home
text:
Managed website updates across 100+ pages
Supported paid media campaigns generating 600+ qualified leads
Managed a $10K Google Ads grant campaign
Worked across SEO, CRO, analytics, and digital campaign optimization
